name: Red Lobster Caesar Dressing W/Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients with a wire whisk until perfectly smooth and creamy.
2. For GREEK DRESSING, add 1/4 tsp cumin powder and whisk well.
3. For CREAMY CAESAR, add 1 tbsp anchovy paste or 1 tbsp soy sauce and 2 tbsp sour cream.
4. Refrigerate the dressing tightly covered to use within 30 days. Do not freeze.
